name: Honey Bear
description: The sweet, enthusiastic, and slightly chaotic heart of the Sisters of Summerville. Honey Bear is a sassy Yorkie who tackles every situation with maximum energy and minimum caution. Originally from Indiana, she's still learning the ways of Southern living — one disaster at a time.

name: Bootsie Belle
description: The scheming, sophisticated, and perpetually unimpressed tuxedo cat who shares the house with Honey Bear. Bootsie Belle is always three steps ahead — whether she's launching a cyber-intrusion from behind the couch or simply judging everyone from the highest shelf.

name: Spot the Hairless Cat
description: A distinguished hairless cat whose appearance is only matched by the intensity of their personality. Spot brings a unique energy to every episode they appear in.

name: Hershey the Yorkie Biker Pup
description: The coolest pup on two wheels. Hershey rolls into Summerville with attitude, a leather jacket, and absolutely zero interest in following the rules. A fan favorite whenever they roar onto the scene.

name: Gumbo the Summerville Howler
description: A true Summerville original. Gumbo's legendary howl can be heard across the whole neighborhood — and usually signals that something very interesting is about to happen.

name: Cap'n Oh Yeah the Wall-Bustin' Corgi
description: No wall is safe. No boundary is respected. Cap'n Oh Yeah bursts onto the scene with unstoppable enthusiasm and a total disregard for structural integrity. The neighborhood's most enthusiastic demolition expert.

name: Nimble Nut
description: Nimble Nut is the self-appointed leader of the Squirrel Mafia that is at war with Honey Bear for chasing them away from the bird feeder.

name: Cardinal
description: A vibrant red cardinal that brings color and life to the Summerville neighborhood. Known for its cheerful songs and striking appearance, the cardinal is a symbol of hope and beauty.

name: Robin
description: A cheerful brown robin that brings joy and energy to the Summerville neighborhood. Known for its melodic songs and vibrant appearance, Robin is a symbol of hope and renewal.

name: Bluejay
description: A striking blue jay that adds a splash of color to the Summerville neighborhood. Known for its bold personality and vibrant plumage, the blue jay is a symbol of confidence and curiosity.

name: Lizzy the Disappearing Gecko
description: Now you see her, now you don't. Lizzy has mastered the art of vanishing at exactly the right moment — usually just before something goes terribly wrong. Whether this is wisdom or cowardice is still debated.

name: Spidey the Rubber Spider Toy
description: Don't let the rubber exterior fool you. Spidey has caused more midnight screams, dramatic leaps, and household chaos than any real spider ever could. A beloved menace.

name: Maggie Jean the Gator Turtle
description: Part turtle, part legend. Maggie Jean moves at her own pace — which is slow, deliberate, and somehow always exactly where you least expect her. Don't be fooled by the shell.

name: Mom
description: The patient, loving, and occasionally exasperated matriarch of the household. Mom keeps the whole operation running — meals, schedules, sourdough bread — while somehow managing to remain the voice of reason in a house full of chaos.

name: Dad
description: The creative force behind it all. Dad brings home gadgets, ideas, and AI-powered pet collars with the enthusiasm of someone who has never once considered the consequences. A Navy veteran, artist, and proud pet dad living his best Summerville life.

name: Big Sister
description: Cool, capable, and always a little suspicious of what the pets have been up to while she was away. Big Sister brings a grounding energy to the family chaos — when she's around.

name: Big Brother
description: The kind of big brother who shows up exactly when things are at their most chaotic. His reactions to the Sisters' latest adventures are always priceless.

name: Belle the Sassy Southern Goose
description: Grace, sass, and an iron will wrapped in white feathers. Belle is the undisputed queen of the yard and she knows it. She tolerates the dog and cat situation — barely — but on her own terms.

name: Beau the Southern Gentleman Goose
description: All Southern charm and good manners, Beau is Belle's devoted companion and the model of genteel behavior. He may tip his metaphorical hat, but don't mistake courtesy for weakness.

name: Radar the Backyard Guardian Pointer
description: Radar is always on duty. Nothing moves in the backyard without being detected, catalogued, and pointed at with laser precision. Squirrels, delivery drivers, leaves — all equally suspicious.

name: Meemaw Grace the Kind-Hearted Caretaker
description: Warm, wise, and full of Southern comfort. Meemaw Grace has a kind word for everyone — including Bootsie Belle, who she insists is just misunderstood. She's probably right.

name: Ace the Forgetful Golfer
description: Ace lives for the fairway — when he can remember where it is. His golf game is as unpredictable as his memory, and somehow both manage to cause maximum disruption to everyone around him.

name: Tiffany the White Persian Cat
description: Immaculate. Elegant. Deeply offended by everything. Tiffany the White Persian Cat operates at a level of sophistication that the rest of the household can only aspire to — and she will never let them forget it.

name: Eileen the Postal Worker
description: The most courageous person on the route. Eileen faces Honey Bear's security protocols and Bootsie Belle's suspicious stares every single day with professional calm and quiet heroism. A true public servant.
